metadata.description: A collection of skills used by the agents in our CSC3213 project, organized into categories for easy reference.

plugins.name: hono
plugins.description: Efficiently develop Hono applications with inline API reference and request testing.

plugins.name: simplewebauthn
plugins.description: Efficiently integrate WebAuthn/passkey flows using the SimpleWebAuthn library, with concise recipes for server and browser-side implementation and debugging.

plugins.name: Next.js
plugins.description: Accelerate Next.js development with inline API reference, request testing, code generation, and best practices.

plugins.name: ShadCN
plugins.description: Accelerate ShadCN UI development with inline API reference, request testing, code generation, and best practices.
